title: Marketing AI Stack Entry
description: One project that belongs on the Marketing AI Stack list. Every entry must answer: what specific marketing atom does this automate, and is it the canonical pick, an alternate, or substrate?

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier; must match the YAML filename (without extension)

url.description: Primary URL — product home page or main docs

repo.description: GitHub repo URL. May be null for hosted services without an open component.

workflow.description: The marketer workflow bucket this entry serves. Substrate is an appendix, not a front-page workflow.

atom.description: The atomic marketing job this entry serves (kebab-case). Substrate entries may use 'mcp-bridge', 'platform', or 'orchestrator' as catch-all atoms.

rank.description: canonical = the one featured pick for this atom; alternate = a differentiated second option (collapsed in README).

automation_depth.description: How autonomous the workflow is. automate = agent runs it end-to-end; augment = AI does 60-80%, marketer drives; assist = AI helps at margins.

why_it_matters.description: One sentence: the specific marketing atom it automates, naming persona and outcome. No adjectives, no fluff.

closed_alternative.description: Name of the closed-source incumbent this replaces or competes with (e.g., 'Jasper', 'Buffer', 'Mailchimp'). Null only when genuinely no incumbent exists.

stats.description: Auto-refreshed nightly by scripts/fetch-stats.js for entries with a repo URL. Leave as nulls at submission time.

submitted.description: Date the entry was first added to the list (YYYY-MM-DD)

last_reviewed.description: Date the curator last re-evaluated this entry's rank vs. alternatives. Quarterly re-review is the target cadence.

status.description: active = endorsed; watchlist = flagged (stale, early, ToS-risk); archived = upstream archived or no longer maintained
